name: Blueberry Bread Pudding with Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend together the milk, Egg Beaters, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Place bread cubes in the bottom of a lightly greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish; sprinkle with blueberries.
3. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the bread and blueberry mixture.
4. Set the dish in a pan filled with 1-inch of hot water.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until set, turning off heat after reaching desired doneness.
6. Meanwhile, make caramel sauce by heating the remaining skim milk and caramels over medium heat, stirring frequently, until melted.
